judge_result.short_rationale: All required actions are present in the correct order: rinse/hold eye open for 15-20 minutes, remove contacts after 5 minutes, then call doctor or poison control immediately. No dangerous added advice. Usability is reduced by hedged, overexplained wording that is less field-usable.
